items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is a fighter who will always go out on his shield and fight with a kill-or-be-killed style.
items.quote: Ponzibio, one thing about him, he will go out there, kill or be killed. He's going to go out on a shield.

items.claim: Sam Patterson possesses a bit of defensive liability due to his tall man's defense.
items.quote: Sam Patterson does have a bit of that tall man's defense

items.claim: Sam Patterson made a great move by moving up to the welterweight division.
items.quote: I think that Patterson made a great move going up to welterweight.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has sufficient boxing skills to hang with Santiago Ponzinibio.
items.quote: I think that he's got the boxing to hang out to hang with with Ponzinibio.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim has good hands and boxing success when he is fresh.
items.quote: while Ismile Bonfam is fresh that he can have some boxing success because when Bonfim is fresh, his hands for MMA are good.

items.claim: Ismael Bonfim tends to break when he is pressured or forced to fight on the back foot.
items.quote: as soon as you answer to the bully, he constant he tends to break a little bit.

items.claim: Axel Sola was rocked badly in his last fight.
items.quote: He got rocked badly his last fight.
The issue with him is he's extremely chinny

items.claim: Brenesen Hibbero has been finished in the first round in three consecutive fights.
items.quote: this guy's been finished in the first round, three fights in a row.
